title: A closer look at the AI hype train
desc: As Thailand adopts artificial intelligence (AI), IT specialists warn some government agencies developing AI projects may repeat the mistakes of the app development era, when huge budgets were spent on digital projects that allegedly delivered little benefit to the public.
title_cn: 泰国人工智能项目面临预算浪费风险
summary_cn: 泰国在采纳人工智能技术之际，IT专家警告政府部门正在开发的众多AI项目存在重蹈应用开发时代覆辙的风险。当年政府投入巨资开发数字项目，最终对公众的实际益处却十分有限。专家建议政府应从过往教训中汲取经验，确保AI投资能够产生实实在在的社会效益。
desc_original: As Thailand adopts artificial intelligence (AI), IT specialists warn some government agencies developing AI projects may repeat the mistakes of the app development era, when huge budgets were spent on digital projects that allegedly delivered little benefit to the public.

title: Govt tightens sales rules for cannabis
desc: The Department of Thai Traditional and Alternative Medicine has tightened controls on cannabis sales following new ministerial regulations restricting cannabis use strictly to medical purposes.
title_cn: 泰国强化大麻销售管制
summary_cn: 泰国传统与替代医学部（Department of Thai Traditional and Alternative Medicine）根据新发布的部级条例，进一步加强了对大麻销售的监管力度。新规将大麻使用范围严格限制在医疗用途，反映了政府对大麻流通的谨慎态度。该措施旨在防止大麻在医疗领域外的非法或滥用，确保公众健康。
desc_original: The Department of Thai Traditional and Alternative Medicine has tightened controls on cannabis sales following new ministerial regulations restricting cannabis use strictly to medical purposes.

title: Navy pushes new frigate plan
desc: The Royal Thai Navy has defended its plan to procure a second frigate after funding for the vessel was removed from the proposed 2027 fiscal budget, insisting the service still lacks sufficient combat capability to carry out its maritime missions.
title_cn: 泰国海军坚持护卫舰采购计划
summary_cn: 泰国皇家海军为其采购第二艘护卫舰的方案进行辩护，尽管相关经费已从2027财年预算草案中被删除。海军坚持认为当前海上防御力量不足，难以有效执行各项海上任务。该舰艇的采购对于提升国防能力和维护海上安全具有重要战略意义。
desc_original: The Royal Thai Navy has defended its plan to procure a second frigate after funding for the vessel was removed from the proposed 2027 fiscal budget, insisting the service still lacks sufficient combat capability to carry out its maritime missions.

title: Tourism strategy targets high-spending visitors
desc: The Tourism Council of Thailand (TCT) has offered Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul a plan to drive high-value tourism over a four-year term.
title_cn: 泰国推出高端旅游发展战略
summary_cn: 泰国旅游委员会（Tourism Council of Thailand, TCT）向总理阿努廷·甲为猜提交了一份为期四年的高价值旅游发展计划。该战略重点是吸引高端消费游客，提升旅游业的质量和经济效益。通过聚焦高消费市场，泰国旅游业有望实现更加可持续和高质量的增长。
desc_original: The Tourism Council of Thailand (TCT) has offered Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul a plan to drive high-value tourism over a four-year term.

title: Govt pushes fast-track expressway expansion plans
desc: Transport Minister Phiphat Ratchakitprakarn has ordered the Expressway Authority of Thailand (Exat) to accelerate key expressway projects to ease chronic congestion in Bangkok and support urban and regional economic growth.
title_cn: 曼谷快速公路扩建加速推进
summary_cn: 交通部长皮帕特·拉查基特帕克（Phiphat Ratchakitprakarn）已责令泰国快速公路管理局（Expressway Authority of Thailand, Exat）加快推进重点快速公路建设项目。此举旨在有效缓解曼谷长期存在的交通拥堵现象，促进城市和周边地区的经济协调发展，提升居民和游客的出行效率。
desc_original: Transport Minister Phiphat Ratchakitprakarn has ordered the Expressway Authority of Thailand (Exat) to accelerate key expressway projects to ease chronic congestion in Bangkok and support urban and regional economic growth.

title: State agencies deny graft claims
desc: Several state agencies have refuted allegations of corruption and launched internal investigations after a business sector survey identifying high bribery risks prompted the government to pledge sweeping anti-graft reforms.
title_cn: 国家机构否认贪腐指控
summary_cn: 泰国多个国家机构对贪腐指控进行了反驳，并启动内部调查。此前进行的商业部门调查显示该国存在较高的贿赂风险，特别是在高风险行业。这份调查结果促使泰国政府承诺进行广泛的反腐改革，以提升国际商业信心和改善营商环境。
desc_original: Several state agencies have refuted allegations of corruption and launched internal investigations after a business sector survey identifying high bribery risks prompted the government to pledge sweeping anti-graft reforms.

title: Bangkok nightlife raids signal broader sweep across Thai tourist hotspots
desc: Authorities in Bangkok conducted a nightlife inspection that uncovered untaxed alcohol, amid wider enforcement campaigns targeting entertainment venues. PATTAYA, Thailand – Internal Security Operations Command Region 1 (ISOC Region 1), in coordination with multiple agencies, carried out inspections of entertainment venues in the Huai Khwang area on the night of May 14 as part of ongoing nationwide efforts to enforce legal compliance in nightlife and tourism zones. Authorities said similar operations have been intensified in key tourist destinations across Thailand, including Pattaya and other
title_cn: 曼谷娱乐场所突击检查启动全国执法行动
summary_cn: 曼谷内安司令部第一区与多个执法部门在淮夸（Huai Khwang）地区进行了娱乐场所突击检查，发现未按规定缴税的酒精饮料。作为更广泛的全国执法行动的一部分，泰国当局正在加大对包括芭提雅等主要旅游目的地的娱乐场所的合规检查力度。
desc_original: Authorities in Bangkok conducted a nightlife inspection that uncovered untaxed alcohol, amid wider enforcement campaigns targeting entertainment venues. Authorities said similar operat

title: Pattaya opens massive TCAS and Study Abroad Fair to guide students toward university futures
desc: Mayor Poramet Ngampichet encouraged students to pursue their dreams with confidence, saying the city is committed to supporting local youth and expanding educational opportunities for the next generation. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya City has launched the “PATTAYA’s TCAS & STUDY ABROAD FAIR 2026,” a large-scale education and university guidance event aimed at helping students prepare for higher education opportunities in Thailand and overseas. The event, held on May 15–16 at the Pattaya Indoor Athletics Building in Chonburi, was officially opened by Pattaya Mayor Poramet Ngampichet alongsid
title_cn: 芭提雅举办TCAS与留学博览会助力学生升学规划
summary_cn: 芭提雅在室内田径馆成功举办「2026年芭提雅TCAS与留学博览会」（5月15-16日），这是一场大规模教育指导活动，帮助学生为泰国和海外高等教育机会做准备。芭提雅市长波拉美（Poramet Ngampichet）在开幕式上鼓励学生充满信心地追求梦想，表示城市致力于支持本地青年发展。
desc_original: Mayor Poramet Ngampichet encouraged students to pursue their dreams with confidence, saying the city is committed to supporting local youth and expanding educational opportunities for the next generation. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya City has launched the “PATTAYA’s TCAS & STUDY ABROAD FAIR 2026,” a large-scale education and university guidance event aimed at helping students prepare for higher education opportunities in Thailand and overseas. The event, held on May 15–16 at the Pattaya Indoo

title: Pattaya pushes city order, market fairness and flood readiness ahead of June 28 elections
desc: Pattaya officials are pushing ahead with city management, flood prevention, and traffic enforcement measures ahead of local elections scheduled for June 28 in Pattaya and Bangkok. PATTAYA, Thailand – Deputy Mayor Wutthisak Rermkijakarn has instructed city departments to continue public service operations without disruption ahead of local elections scheduled for June 28 in Pattaya and Bangkok, while intensifying efforts to improve city management, tourism image, and public safety. Speaking during an administration meeting at Pattaya City Hall on May 15, Wutthisak emphasized that all agencies mu
title_cn: 芭提雅加强城市治理和防洪为6月28日选举做准备
summary_cn: 芭提雅副市长在市政厅行政会议上强调，在6月28日的地方选举前，所有部门应继续无中断地提供公共服务。副市长指示各部门加强城市管理、防洪准备和交通执法工作，同时推进旅游形象改善和公共安全建设，确保选举顺利进行和市民生活质量不受影响。
desc_original: Pattaya officials are pushing ahead with city management, flood prevention, and traffic enforcement measures ahead of local elections scheduled for June 28 in Pattaya and Bangkok. PATTAYA, Thailand – Deputy Mayor Wutthisak Rermkijakarn has instructed city departments to continue public service operations without disruption ahead of local elections scheduled for June 28 in Pattaya and Bangkok, while intensifying efforts to improve city management, tourism image, and public safety. title: Pakistani rider and Thai passenger slam into house wall in late-night Pattaya crash
desc: A Pakistani motorcyclist and his Thai passenger were seriously injured after their bike lost control and crashed into a house wall in South Pattaya. PATTAYA, Thailand – A violent motorcycle crash left a Pakistani tourist and his Thai female passenger seriously injured after their bike lost control and slammed into a house wall in the early hours of May 15. Police were notified at 4:00 a.m. of the accident in Soi Setthi, South Pattaya. Officers from Pattaya Police Station, along with rescue workers from Sawang Boriboon and medical teams, rushed to the scene. (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle ||
title_cn: 巴基斯坦游客与泰国乘客摩托车撞房重伤
summary_cn: 一名巴基斯坦游客骑驾的摩托车在南芭提雅（South Pattaya）失控，撞上民宅围墙，导致车手和泰国女性乘客均重伤。事故发生在5月15日凌晨4时许的塞提巷（Soi Setthi）。芭提雅警方、救援队和医疗队伍迅速赶赴现场进行救援和医治。
desc_original: A Pakistani motorcyclist and his Thai passenger were seriously injured after their bike lost control and crashed into a house wall in South Pattaya. title: Monsoon onslaught brings flood warnings and rough seas across Thailand
desc: Thailand has officially entered the rainy season as the TMD warns of heavy to very heavy rainfall, strong monsoon winds, and rising flood risks across multiple regions. PATTAYA, Thailand – The Thai Meteorological Department (TMD) has officially announced that Thailand has entered the rainy season, while also issuing its fifth weather warning for heavy to very heavy rainfall and strong winds over the Andaman Sea, with high-risk and moderate-risk alerts covering dozens of provinces nationwide. In the next 24 hours, rainfall is expected to increase across the country, with some areas—particularly
title_cn: 季风来袭 泰国发布洪涝和恶劣海况预警
summary_cn: 泰国气象部门(TMD)正式宣布国家进入雨季，并发布第五次强降雨和强风预警。全国数十个地区被列为高风险或中风险地区。未来24小时，全国将普遍增加降雨，部分地区出现强到特强降雨。安达曼海(Andaman Sea)风浪恶劣，对海上活动和沿海交通构成威胁。
desc_original: Thailand has officially entered the rainy season as the TMD warns of heavy to very heavy rainfall, strong monsoon winds, and rising flood risks across multiple regions. PATTAYA, Thailand – The Thai Meteorological Department (TMD) has officially announced that Thailand has entered the rainy season, while also issuing its fifth weather warning for heavy to very heavy rainfall and strong winds over the Andaman Sea, with high-risk and moderate-risk alerts covering dozens of provinces nationwide. title: Pattaya faces El Niño-driven unsettled weather with periodic rain through October
desc: Thailand has entered the rainy season, with the TMD warning of below-average rainfall this year, while Pattaya and the eastern coast face periods of heavy rain, flash flood risks, and seasonal weather disruptions. PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand has officially entered the rainy season as of May 15, following confirmation from the Thai Meteorological Department (TMD) that weather conditions have met all required criteria, including widespread rainfall and the establishment of the southwest monsoon. The rainy season in upper Thailand is expected to last until mid-October, while southern coastal are
title_cn: 厄尔尼诺影响 芭提雅迎十月前不稳定天气
summary_cn: 泰国于5月15日正式进入雨季，气象部门已确认各项气候指标符合要求，包括广泛降雨和西南季风形成。气象部门预警今年降雨量可能低于平均水平，但芭提雅及东部沿海地区仍可能遭遇周期性强降雨和山洪暴发。上泰北地区雨季预计延续至10月中旬。
desc_original: Thailand has entered the rainy season, with the TMD warning of below-average rainfall this year, while Pattaya and the eastern coast face periods of heavy rain, flash flood risks, and seasonal weather disruptions. PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand has officially entered the rainy season as of May 15, following confirmation from the Thai Meteorological Department (TMD) that weather conditions have met all required criteria, including widespread rainfall and the establishment of the southwest monsoon.

title: Behind the bars and bright lights, Pattaya workers are fighting to survive
desc: Behind Pattaya’s nightlife glow, many bar workers say falling tourist spending and rising living costs are making it increasingly difficult to survive. PATTAYA, Thailand – Beneath the neon lights and nightlife image that have long defined Pattaya, many workers in the city’s entertainment industry say they are increasingly struggling to survive as tourist spending weakens and living costs continue to climb. For some bar workers, the reality begins after the music stops — standing roadside late at night buying inexpensive meals after shifts that no longer provide the income they once did. (adsby
title_cn: 霓虹灯下的困境 芭提雅娱乐业工作者生存艰难
summary_cn: 芭提雅娱乐业工作者面临游客消费下降和生活成本上升的双重困境。许多酒吧员工反映薪酬和小费收入大幅下滑，被迫在深夜路边购买廉价食物维生。这反映出在全球经济放缓背景下，以旅游业为支柱的芭提雅一线服务工作人员的收入严重受损，生存压力陡增。
desc_original: Behind Pattaya’s nightlife glow, many bar workers say falling tourist spending and rising living costs are making it increasingly difficult to survive. title: Tomorrowland sets off hotel rush across Eastern Thailand, from Pattaya to Bang Saen
desc: The upcoming Tomorrowland festival is driving strong momentum in Thailand’s eastern hotel sector, with bookings spreading from Pattaya to Bang Saen as organizers secure accommodations and tourism officials anticipate a major economic boost for the region. PATTAYA, Thailand – The upcoming staging of Tomorrowland in Thailand is already generating strong momentum in the hospitality sector across the eastern region, with hotel bookings rising sharply in Pattaya and nearby Bang Saen ahead of the world-famous music festival. The event is scheduled to take place from December 11–13 at Wisdom Valley,
title_cn: 明日世界音乐节掀酒店预订热 覆盖芭提雅至邦塞地区
summary_cn: Tomorrowland国际电子音乐节的举办权获得，在泰国东部酒店业掀起强劲预订热潮。从芭提雅到邦塞(Bang Saen)，各大酒店预订量剧增。该节日定于12月11-13日在智慧谷(Wisdom Valley)举办，组织方已开始大规模预订住宿。旅游部门预计该盛事将为东部地区带来显著经济收益。
desc_original: The upcoming Tomorrowland festival is driving strong momentum in Thailand’s eastern hotel sector, with bookings spreading from Pattaya to Bang Saen as organizers secure accommodations and tourism officials anticipate a major economic boost for the region. PATTAYA, Thailand – The upcoming staging of Tomorrowland in Thailand is already generating strong momentum in the hospitality sector across the eastern region, with hotel bookings rising sharply in Pattaya and nearby Bang Saen ahead of the worl

title: E-commerce platforms defend rising fees
desc: The Thai Digital Platform Trade Association (TDPA) has defended rising marketplace commission fees and platform business practices amid mounting complaints from online merchants over higher charges, growing competition from imported goods and concerns over platform dominance.
title_cn: 电商平台为手续费上涨辩护
summary_cn: 泰国数字平台贸易协会(TDPA)为在线购物平台上升的手续费和商业模式进行公开辩护。这些费用上调遭到在线商户的广泛抗议，商户认为不仅要承受更高的平台费用，还面临进口商品的激烈竞争和大型平台的垄断压力。争议反映出电商生态中平台与商户利益分配的矛盾。
desc_original: The Thai Digital Platform Trade Association (TDPA) has defended rising marketplace commission fees and platform business practices amid mounting complaints from online merchants over higher charges, growing competition from imported goods and concerns over platform dominance.

title: Accused supplier of Phuket hitman’s gun arrested in Pattaya
desc: Police in Pattaya have arrested a British man accused of supplying a weapon to a Colombian hitman involved in the fatal shooting of an Iraqi man in Phuket in February.
title_cn: 英国男子因向普吉杀手供枪在芭提雅被捕
summary_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）警方逮捕一名英国男子，他被指控向哥伦比亚杀手供应枪支。该杀手今年2月在普吉岛（Phuket）参与枪击案，致一名伊拉克男子身亡。本案涉及跨国犯罪网络，牵连多国人员，反映泰国面临的复杂安全挑战。
desc_original: Police in Pattaya have arrested a British man accused of supplying a weapon to a Colombian hitman involved in the fatal shooting of an Iraqi man in Phuket in February.

title: Thailand mandates 42-day hantavirus quarantine
desc: Thailand has classified hantavirus as a dangerous communicable disease despite no cases having been detected in the country, saying that any high-risk contacts of infected persons must quarantine for 42 days.
title_cn: 泰国强制规定汉坦病毒密切接触者隔离42天
summary_cn: 泰国政府已将汉坦病毒列为危险传染病，尽管目前该国尚未发现确诊病例。新规定要求与感染者有密切接触的高风险人群必须隔离42天。这一预防措施反映泰国对新兴传染病的警惕态度，旨在建立防护体系。该政策可能涉及在泰外国人的隔离要求。
desc_original: Thailand has classified hantavirus as a dangerous communicable disease despite no cases having been detected in the country, saying that any high-risk contacts of infected persons must quarantine for 42 days.

title: 泰国TOPS放大招！超多中国爆款零食、泡面、火锅川粉全上线
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月15日，泰国中央零售（Central Retail）旗下TOPS重磅举办「Discover China: The Legends of Flavor 寻味中国：传奇风味之旅」主题发布会，正式开启一场跨越神州大地的中华味觉盛宴。本次中国美食节严选中国各地经典风味与优质食材，从传统秘制调味、人气速食、地道零食到地方特色原料一应俱全，带领消费者沉浸式探寻3000余年中华饮食文化底蕴，足不出境即可沉浸式感受地道中国味。 本次活动重磅呈现中国四大传奇风味，一站式解锁南北美食精髓： 四川麻辣风味：麻辣鲜香、劲爽过瘾，带来德庄红薯苕皮、翠宏辣椒面、海底捞火锅底料、白家酸辣粉、阿宽重庆小面、好欢螺加辣螺蛳粉、天天火锅宽粉等川味经典，一口沦陷正宗巴蜀滋味。 山东醇厚风味：浓郁醇厚、咸香适口，精选Yummy House鲍鱼扇贝调味酱、好丽友奶糖、胖哥蟹黄味蚕豆、小胖子葵花籽等好物，尽显北方风味地道本色。 淮扬精致风味：细腻平衡、精工细作，涵盖天豫即食去壳板栗、傻二哥青春怀旧锅巴、CHI FOREST黑松露条、红薯细粉等优品，还原淮扬雅致食韵。 粤式清鲜风味：恪守本味、清鲜爽口，带来李锦记蚝油、纯黑芝麻油、花椒油、蜜梨、康师傅红烧牛肉面等粤式经典，品味岭南鲜醇。 除此之外，现场更集结火锅粉、方便面、特色零食、原产食材等全品类中华美食，每一处都藏着惊喜风味，全方位满足美食爱好者的味蕾
title_cn: TOPS超市推出「寻味中国」主题美食节
summary_cn: 泰国中央零售（Central Retail）旗下高端超市TOPS于5月15日举办「寻味中国：传奇风味之旅」主题发布会，重点推介四川麻辣、山东醇厚、淮扬精致、粤式清鲜四大风味品类，集中展示爆款零食、方便面、火锅底料、调味酱等数千种中国产品。此举旨在向泰国消费者展示中华饮食文化，促进商业与文化交流。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月15日，泰国中央零售（Central Retail）旗下TOPS重磅举办「Discover China: The Legends of Flavor 寻味中国：传奇风味之旅」主题发布会，正式开启一场跨越神州大地的中华味觉盛宴。本次中国美食节严选中国各地经典风味与优质食材，从传统秘制调味、人气速食、地道零食到地方特色原料一应俱全，带领消费者沉浸式探寻3000余年中华饮食文化底蕴，足不出境即可沉浸式感受地道中国味。 本次活动重磅呈现中国四大传奇风味，一站式解锁南北美食精髓： 四川麻辣风味：麻辣鲜香、劲爽过瘾，带来德庄红薯苕皮、翠宏辣椒面、海底捞火锅底料、白家酸辣粉、阿宽重庆小面、好欢螺加辣螺蛳粉、天天火锅宽粉等川味经典，一口沦陷正宗巴蜀滋味。 山东醇厚风味：浓郁醇厚、咸香适口，精选Yummy House鲍鱼扇贝调味酱、好丽友奶糖、胖哥蟹黄味蚕豆、小胖子葵花籽等好物，尽显北方风味地道本色。 淮扬精致风味：细腻平衡、精工细作，涵盖天豫即食去壳板栗、傻二哥青春怀旧锅巴、CHI FOREST黑松露条、红薯细粉等优品，还原淮扬雅致食韵。 粤式清鲜风味：恪守本味、清鲜爽口，带来李

title: 泰国“陆桥项目”正式启动评估！90天完成可行性研究结
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月15日14时50分，在泰国政府总理府，国家经济与社会发展委员会秘书长、同时担任“推动连接泰国湾与安达曼海陆桥交通基础设施发展方案研究委员会”秘书的丹差，在首次会议结束后接受了媒体采访。 本次会议由副总理兼财政部长艾尼提主持。丹差表示，会议主要讨论了基础资料与工作框架。由于整体研究周期仅有90天，无法从零开始重新研究，因此委员会将以交通与运输政策规划办公室此前最新且较为完整的研究成果为基础，同时参考参议院的相关研究报告。 评估标准将涵盖当前及未来趋势假设、现实问题走向、陆桥项目两端货物流动情况，以及商业可行性。丹差强调，评估将包含所有维度的潜在影响，包括环境层面，并将充分听取公众意见。 此外，会议同意成立三个小组委员会： 陆桥项目推进方向研究小组委员会，由私营部门专家及学者参与； 环境影响评估小组委员会，由自然资源与环境部常务秘书担任主席，并由环境专家及相关机构代表组成； 公众参与与公共传播推进小组委员会，由交通部常务秘书担任主席，负责信息公开、公众咨询，并综合考量地方关切与社会担忧。 上述三个小组委员会将在下次会议（预计6月）上向主委员会汇报进展。 当被问及是否会听取学者及非政府组织的意见时，丹差表示，这些意见都将被纳入综合考虑。 关于该项目未来是否会以类似《东部经济走廊法》（EEC法案）的形式立法，他表示目前尚未讨论法律框架问题，现阶段重点仍是评估项目可行性
title_cn: 泰国陆桥项目正式启动90天可行性评估
summary_cn: 泰国政府5月15日启动「连接泰国湾与安达曼海陆桥交通基础设施发展」项目的评估工作，为期90天。国家经济与社会发展委员会将从现状趋势、商业可行性及环保影响等多维度评估。同时成立三个小组委员会分别负责项目推进方向研究、环境影响评估及公众参与，下次汇报计划于6月进行。

title: 开口就要10万铢！泰国“索贿风险最高”政府机构排行榜公布
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 泰国三大私营机构联合委员会（JSCCIB）近日公布了一项关于企业界亲身经历的腐败调查结果。调查显示，在向政府机构申请许可证的企业中，有60.9%的受访者表示，在最近一次申请过程中曾遭遇暗示性沟通或被要求提供“回报”。 此外，45.9%的企业确认曾向政府官员支付现金、赠送礼物或提供其他利益以换取办事便利；另有37.3%的企业表示，其所属行业在争取政府项目合同时，必须额外支付“特别费用”，平均占合同金额的11%至15%。 调查指出，最常见的贿赂形式包括：现金（46.6%）、礼品或宴请招待（23.1%），以及捐款或赞助（18.7%）。 在最近一次政府招标过程中，也发现多项令人担忧的迹象：27.3%的受访者表示曾有人声称“可以帮助中标”；另有27.3%的人被暗示应使用某些特定中介或顾问公司。 至于企业愿意支付贿赂的主要原因，29.1%认为是行政流程过于复杂，25.0%指出法律赋予官员过多自由裁量权，18.8%则表示是为了解决违规问题。 与此同时，超过52.3%的企业对政府举报渠道缺乏信心；另有43.7%的企业坦言，即便遭遇索贿也“不敢举报”。 值得关注的是，本轮调查首次公开政府各机构的“受贿风险排名”，评估标准包括： 1. 在接触过程中被要求提供利益的比例； 2. 单次贿赂的平均金额。 索贿比例最高的10个政府单位： 1. 高速公路警察／交通警察：平均每年接触1.69次，
title_cn: 泰国政府贪腐风险部门排行榜公布
summary_cn: 泰国三大私营机构联合委员会发布企业反腐调查结果。调查显示60.9%申请许可证企业遭遇贪腐暗示，45.9%被迫支付贿赂，平均占合同额11-15%。贿赂形式包括现金、礼品宴请和捐款赞助。高速公路警察和交通警察被列为贪腐风险最高部门。超52%企业对举报渠道缺乏信心，43.7%企业因恐惧而不敢举报。

title: Swedish man reports over 100,000 baht stolen by Pattaya transwomen
desc: Swedish man reports over 100,000 baht stolen by Pattaya transwomen Legacy A Swedish tourist reported losing more than 100,000 baht in cash after being robbed a group of Thai transwomen at a condominium in Pattaya early today, May 15. Police from Mueang Pattaya Police Station received the complaint from the victim, identified as 67 year old Mahmoud, at around 3.40am before travelling to the condominium to investigate the incident. According to Mahmoud, he had visited entertainment venues along Pattaya Walking Street before meeting two Thai transwomen. He later invited them back to his accommoda
title_cn: 瑞典游客在芭提雅 Pattaya 遭跨性别女性抢劫逾10万泰铢
summary_cn: 一名67岁瑞典游客Mahmoud在芭提雅沙滩街（Pattaya Walking Street）娱乐区遇见两名泰国跨性别女性后，邀请她们回到其住宿的公寓。在凌晨时段，该游客遭抢劫，损失超过10万泰铢现金。莫昂芭提雅警署 Mueang Pattaya Police Station 于5月15日凌晨接报并前往调查。

title: Student condos near the top universities of Bangkok’s
desc: Student condos near the top universities of Bangkok’s Legacy International students arriving in Bangkok approach their housing search in all kinds of ways, but the most common mistake is treating price as the only filter. The cheapest room in the wrong neighbourhood can cost more in time, stress, and compromised study conditions than the money saved on rent. The neighbourhoods immediately surrounding Bangkok’s leading international universities vary enormously in safety infrastructure, study environment, and day-to-day practicality. Getting those three things right matters more tha
title_cn: 曼谷顶级大学附近的学生公寓
summary_cn: 选择学生宿舍时，价格不应是唯一考量因素。曼谷顶尖国际大学周边社区在安全基础设施、学习环境和日常生活便利性等方面存在巨大差异。选对居住地比节省租金更重要，这涉及时间成本、生活压力、学习效率等多方面权衡。

title: Thailand’s ‘last titan’ confirmed as Southeast Asia’s biggest dinosaur on record
desc: Thailand’s ‘last titan’ confirmed as Southeast Asia’s biggest dinosaur on record Legacy Scientists have identified a new dinosaur species in Thailand , the largest ever found in Southeast Asia , after fossils unearthed beside a pond in Chaiyaphum province were confirmed as belonging to a colossal long-necked sauropod estimated to have measured 27 metres and weighed around 27 to 30 tonnes. The species, named Nagatitan chaiyaphumensis, lived between 100 and 120 million years ago during the late Early Cretaceous period, roughly 40 million years before Tyrannosaurus rex (T-
title_cn: 泰国发现东南亚最大恐龙化石「最后的泰坦」
summary_cn: 科学家在差帕帕 Chaiyaphum 省一处池塘旁发现新恐龙种化石，命名为Nagatitan chaiyaphumensis。该恐龙为长颈蜥脚类，身长27米，体重27-30吨，距今1亿-1.2亿年前的白垩纪早期生活。这是东南亚地区有记录以来最大的恐龙物种，比霸王龙（Tyrannosaurus rex）早出现约4000万年。

title: Soap scraps reused at cosmetic product manufacturing site in Bangkok
desc: Soap scraps reused at cosmetic product manufacturing site in Bangkok Legacy Central Investigation Bureau (CIB) officers raided an unlicensed production site in Bangkok and discovered soap manufactured from soap scraps collected from multiple factories. The Consumer Protection Police Division launched the investigation following complaints from consumers who experienced allergic reactions and other health problems linked to cosmetic products sold online. During the operation, investigators identified a residence in Bang Khae district that was producing and distributing various soap products thr
title_cn: 曼谷查获用废皂渣制造化妆品的非法作坊
summary_cn: 中央调查局 Central Investigation Bureau 突击搜查曼谷邦开 Bang Khae 区的非法生产点，发现大量用多家工厂回收的废旧肥皂渣制造的各类肥皂和化妆品。消费者购买后报告出现过敏反应、皮肤问题等健康不良反应。消费者保护警察分局因消费者投诉而启动调查。

title: 泰国总理阿努廷召集30余位商业巨头，这场“闭门会”释放重大经济信号
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月15日，泰国总理兼内政部长阿努廷携内阁成员，在总理府举办主题为“企业家发声、政府倾听”的政企座谈会。本次座谈会于当日17时正式举行，主办方特邀泰国十大重点产业领域的34位头部企业高层及商界领袖参会，搭建政企高效沟通对话平台。 本次活动旨在聚焦泰国经济高质量发展，共同研讨提升国家整体经济竞争力的核心路径，广泛听取工商界、各产业龙头企业的发展建议与诉求，为泰国产业升级、经济提质增效凝聚政企合力。 据官方最终确认的参会名单显示，本次活动共计34位泰国顶尖企业家、企业高层管理人员出席，覆盖商贸、金融、农食、电子、汽车、能源、酒店、医疗、建筑、地产零售等核心产业领域，参会核心代表名单如下： 来自三大私营机构联合委员会及泰国旅游工业理事会的代表： 泰国商会及泰国商会联合会主席：波节（Poj Aramwattananont） 泰国工业联合会主席：萍佳（Pimjai Leeissaranukul） 泰国银行公会主席：帕勇（Payong Srivanich） 泰国旅游工业理事会主席：猜 金融机构代表： 曼谷银行（Bangkok Bank）：副总裁高盛达（Kobsak Pootrakool），代表曼谷银行总裁兼执行董事陈智深（Chartsiri Sophonpanich）出席 开泰银行（Kasikornbank）：首席执行官卡提娅（Kattiya Indaravijay
title_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷召集34位商业巨头，「企业家发声、政府倾听」座谈会释放重大经济信号
summary_cn: 5月15日，泰国总理兼内政部长阿努廷及内阁成员在总理府召开政企高层座谈会。本次活动邀请来自泰国十大重点产业领域的34位顶尖企业高管参加，涵盖商贸、金融、农食、电子、汽车、能源、酒店、医疗、建筑、地产零售等核心产业。座谈旨在聚焦泰国经济高质量发展，共同研讨提升国家经济竞争力的核心路径，听取各产业龙头企业的发展建议。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月15日，泰国总理兼内政部长阿努廷携内阁成员，在总理府举办主题为“企业家发声、政府倾听”的政企座谈会。本次座谈会于当日17时正式举行，主办方特邀泰国十大重点产业领域的34位头部企业高层及商界领袖参会，搭建政企高效沟通对话平台。 本次活动旨在聚焦泰国经济高质量发展，共同研讨提升国家整体经济竞争力的核心路径，广泛听取工商界、各产业龙头企业的发展建议与诉求，为泰国产业升级、经济提质增效凝聚政企合力。 据官方最终确认的参会名单显示，本次活动共计34位泰国顶尖企业家、企业高层管理人员出席，覆盖商贸、金融、农食、电子、汽车、能源、酒店、医疗、建筑、地产零售等核心产业领域，参会核心代表名单如下： 来自三大私营机构联合委员会及泰国旅游工业理事会的代表： 泰国商会及泰国商会联合会主席：波节（Poj Aramwattananont） 泰国工业联合会主席：萍佳（Pimjai Leeissaranukul） 泰国银行公会主席：帕勇（Payong Srivanich） 泰国旅游工业理事会主席：猜 金融机构代表： 曼谷银行（Bangkok Bank）：副总裁高盛达（Kobsak Po

title: Thai riders share mixed responses against ‘Global Switch Off’ campaign
desc: Thai riders share mixed responses against ‘Global Switch Off’ campaign Legacy Thai app-based riders raised mixed responses after an encouragement to join an international protest campaign, Global Switch Off , today, May 15, by temporarily shutting down digital platforms to demand stronger labour protections from companies. Gig workers include freelancers and independent contractors who work through digital applications, such as food delivery riders and ride-hailing drivers. Many platform companies classify workers as “partners” instead of employees, creating ongoing disputes over l
title_cn: 泰国骑手对「全球停工」活动反应不一
summary_cn: 泰国网约车和外卖送餐骑手就国际劳动权利保护运动「全球停工」表态各异。该活动号召平台从业者暂时关闭数字应用，以争取企业方面提供更强有力的劳动保障。许多平台公司将送餐员、出租车司机等自由职业者和独立承包商归类为「合作伙伴」而非正式员工，长期引发关于劳动权益的争议。
desc_original: Thai riders share mixed responses against ‘Global Switch Off’ campaign Legacy Thai app-based riders raised mixed responses after an encouragement to join an international protest campaign, Global Switch Off , today, May 15, by temporarily shutting down digital platforms to demand stronger labour protections from companies. title: Centara unveils new brand experience touchpoints designed to elevate every stay
desc: Centara unveils new brand experience touchpoints designed to elevate every stay Legacy Centara Hotels & Resorts , Thailand’s leading hotel operator, introduces its enhanced Centara Brand Experience. A thoughtfully curated collection of signature touchpoints designed to elevate the guest journey across its properties. title_cn: Centara 酒店推出品牌体验升级计划
summary_cn: 泰国领先酒店集团 Centara Hotels & Resorts 推出升级版品牌体验计划，以「愉悦享受」为品牌承诺，将舒适、连接与本地发现有机融合，为商务、休闲等各类旅客打造更有意义的住宿体验。该计划在泰国中部古都、联合国世界文化遗产地阿育陀耶的 Centara Ayutthaya 酒店进行首场品牌体验发布展示。

title: Bangkok teacher allegedly holds student’s phone for 10,000 baht
desc: Bangkok teacher allegedly holds student’s phone for 10,000 baht Legacy A school in Bangkok is facing scrutiny after a teacher confiscated a student’s mobile phone and demanded 10,000 baht for its return. The incident was publicised yesterday, May 14, by the Facebook page เจ๊ม้อย v+ . The incident occurred on April 20, but the identities of the school, teacher, and student were not disclosed. title_cn: 曼谷教师疑勒索学生1万泰铢换手机
summary_cn: 曼谷一学校爆出教师没收学生手机并索要1万泰铢才肯归还的勒索事件。该学生系从泰国东南部那拉提瓦府转入曼谷读书，远离家人，与在曼谷的叔叔相依为命。事件虽实际发生于4月20日，但直到5月14日才被曝光，已引起相关教育部门和执法机构的关注。

title: Khon Kaen family warns public after finding tissue paper in fish ball
desc: Khon Kaen family warns public after finding tissue paper in fish ball Legacy A family in Khon Kaen has issued a public warning after discovering tissue paper stuffed inside a fish ball purchased from a street food stall at Kaen Nakhon Lake. The incident gained attention after the family shared photos and videos in a Facebook group for Khon Kaen residents. According to the post, the fish ball stall was located near the entrance to Kaen Nakhon Lake, and the food had been purchased by the family’s grandmother. The family explained that the grandmother bought several varieties of fish balls from t
title_cn: 孔敬家族警告：街头鱼丸内发现纸巾
summary_cn: 泰国孔敬府一家族在孔敬湖畔购买的街头鱼丸内发现纸巾，家族随后在社交媒体分享相关照片和视频，警示公众留意街头食品的质量问题。该鱼丸摊位位于孔敬湖景区入口附近，是当地知名的街头美食地点。事件曝光后，已在当地居民群体中引起广泛警惕和防范意识。

summary_cn: 芭提雅 Avani 度假村内的 Dicey Reilly's 餐厅将在5月29日举办阿根廷主题美食品鉴活动。活动提供精选阿根廷葡萄酒与餐品配对，配合优雅的现场音乐表演，营造轻松精致的用餐氛围。该活动特别适合寻求国际美食体验的旅客和在地居民，票价为1850泰铢/人，报名请通过邮件或电话与酒店联系。

title: 泰国帕岸岛被外国人“占领”？“代持人”一人竟控股80家公司
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月14日，泰国政府和警方在帕岸岛展开大规模扫荡行动，旨在打击盘踞在此的“人头公司”外籍网络，主要锁定由以色列人实际控制的非法泳池别墅生意。此前，执法人员已突击检查多个可疑公司，并通过追踪资金路径发现，有一名泰国人竟独自担任多达80余家公司的股东，遂进一步对岛上24个目标公司的资金流向和交叉持股情况进行排查，尤其针对外国资本利用“泰国代持人”规避《外商经营法》的行为。 这次行动的主要目标是位于素叻他尼府帕岸岛BanChalokLam 7村海滩上的6栋豪华泳池别墅，其由以色列人拥有或承租，每晚价格3万泰铢起，且至少租住3晚。经深入调查，这片土地的所有人是当地泰国人，他与一家名为Taylor Villa的公司签订了为期30年、面积为3莱的土地租赁合同，总金额4700万泰铢，分期支付。但后来却出现了可疑的变动：原本的泰国承租人全部变成了外国人。 商业发展厅的数据显示，帕岸岛上的法人实体共4761家，数量之多也驱使政府加速严查是否存在泰国人被当作“人头”以掩护外国人违法经营的情况。在最新搜查行动中，警方还检查了一间疑似协助外国人处理帕岸岛不动产交易的律师事务所。结果发现，有一名泰国人竟然担任了80-90家公司的股东，且大多是由外国人实控的“人头公司”。 国家警察总署跨国犯罪及非法入境打击中心于是启动“粉碎帕岸岛‘人头公司’”行动，对243家公司进行了检查，发现多家涉嫌使用
title_cn: 泰国帕岸岛被外国人「占领」？「代持人」一人竟控股80家公司
summary_cn: 泰国政府在素叻他尼府帕岸岛展开大规模扫荡，打击由外国人（主要为以色列人）实际控制的非法网络。调查发现一名泰国人竟担任了80多家公司股东，这些公司多为外国人实控的「人头公司」。警方重点查处帕岸岛6栋豪华泳池别墅及协助外国人处理不动产交易的律师事务所，旨在打击外资规避《外商经营法》的行为。

title: 赵露思带火泰国FUNDAO包包
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月14日，中国女演员赵露思在泰国人气一直很高，近日，她把最爱的腊肠犬玩偶放在泰国品牌FUNDAO手袋里的照片再度引发全球社媒热议，使泰国时尚在国际舞台上价值飙升，又一次提升了泰国的“软实力”。 在这张照片中，赵露思穿着一件蕾丝吊带风格的上衣，搭配泰国设计师Yin-Fundao Baesakul设计的极简“AVA mini”象牙白手袋。这款低调奢华、拥有标志性的蝴蝶翅膀剪影的手工制作包包，整体优雅又简约，而她怀里的“ROSYDOEDIAN TOYS”毛绒玩偶则给整张照片增添了几分可爱和俏皮，瞬间席卷社交媒体。 粉丝们立刻认出这款包包，并且迅速让其成为最新的“爆款包”。虽然FUNDAO早已在国际时尚圈有一定的知名度，也受到全球时尚爱好者喜爱，但赵露思的这次带货依然是泰国“软实力”重要的突破。她的影响力巨大，不仅是粉丝关注，全球的时尚圈也纷纷聚焦泰国时尚，无疑是泰国设计师走向世界的里程碑之一。 （编译：KA；来源：khaosod） The post 赵露思带火泰国FUNDAO包包 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 赵露思带火泰国FUNDAO包包
summary_cn: 中国女演员赵露思在社交媒体分享使用泰国设计师Yin-Fundao Baesakul设计的「AVA mini」象牙白手袋照片，引发全球热议。这款手工制作包包以蝴蝶翅膀剪影为标志，低调奢华，搭配她怀中的腊肠犬玩偶更显可爱。赵露思的影响力使FUNDAO迅速成为「爆款包」，被视为泰国设计师走向世界的重要里程碑，进一步提升了泰国的文化软实力。

title: 自己失误无法出境，中国男子大闹泰国机场被捕
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月14日，泰国移民局发言人呈隆警少将透露，近日网上流传的一段视频显示，一名中国籍男子在素万那普机场出境区用脚踢自动边境控制系统的玻璃门，还和移民局检察人员发生冲突。这一事件发生在星期三（5月13日）下午2点左右，当事人为郑立为（LIWEI ZHENG，音译），约30岁，中国籍，当时他正准备经素万那普机场出境，搭乘9C7282航班返回中国。 郑立为进入自动护照查验通道后，没有按照机器提示的步骤操作，而是把登机牌放在读护照的位置，机器无法识别，所以第一道门没有打开，他因此大发雷霆，用脚猛踢机器的透明玻璃门致其损坏。之后，他又回来把护照放上去，但放得不对，机器还是无法识别，他再一次用脚踹门，接着强行直接穿过机器离开，完全没有完成正常检查过程，就如视频中的那样。 移民局检察人员立刻上前拦截，结果郑立为用中文和英文对检察人员破口大骂，用词非常不礼貌，还试图动手攻击，幸好他的妻子及时上前阻拦。随后，移民局检察人员和素万那普机场安保人员一起把他控制住，移送给北榄府素万那普机场警察局进一步侦办。 警方初步指控郑立为“造成他人财物损坏”罪，最高可判处3年有期徒刑、罚款6万泰铢，或两者并罚。另外，他还必须赔偿素万那普机场自动护照查验通道的设备维修费用，约45万泰铢。郑立为对移民局检察人员的行为还涉嫌“侮辱正在执行职务的公务员”罪，最高可判处1年有期徒刑、罚款2万泰铢，或两者并罚。警
title_cn: 操作失误引冲突，中国男子曼谷机场大闹被捕
summary_cn: 中国籍男子郑立为在曼谷素万那普机场出境时，因操作自动护照查验机失误无法通过，遂用脚踢损坏玻璃门。随后与移民局检察人员冲突，用不礼貌言辞辱骂并试图攻击，被妻子及时阻拦。警方以「造成他人财产损坏」和「侮辱执行职务的公务员」两罪指控，他面临最高3年监禁加6万泰铢罚款，以及45万泰铢的设备维修赔偿费。
